steps.action: Open http://localhost:8000 in fresh browser session with dark color scheme
steps.observed: Dark theme rendered immediately with no flash of light theme

steps.action: Check body text color computed style
Check interactive elements (buttons) use dark theme
steps.expected: Buttons have dark backgrounds with light text
steps.observed: Buttons use dark backgrounds (transparent or surface-700 rgb(26, 29, 46)) with light text (rgb(232, 232, 237) or muted rgb(107, 114, 128))

steps.expected: All surfaces dark - background, text, cards, inputs
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms dark theme across all visible UI surfaces - dark background, light text, dark search bar, dark top bar

steps.action: Find elements using accent color in computed styles
steps.observed: Found: 'Scribe' wordmark text, logo SVG, animated pulse dot all use rgb(0, 212, 255)

steps.expected: Accent used on buttons, focus states, wordmark, interactive elements
steps.observed: Accent used in: TopBar wordmark (text-accent), TopBar search focus:border-accent, drop zone hover:border-accent, loading spinners (border-t-accent), progress dots (bg-accent), memo ID badges (text-accent)

steps.action: Calculate WCAG AA contrast ratio of #00d4ff on #0a0a0f
steps.observed: 11.16:1 contrast ratio - well above WCAG AA requirement

steps.expected: Teal accent visible on wordmark and UI elements
steps.observed: Screenshot shows teal 'Scribe' in wordmark, teal pulse indicator dot, teal accent throughout UI

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-PWA-014 (Dark Mode Is Default): body background is #0a0a0f (dark), text is #e8e8ed (light), all buttons and interactive elements use dark theme colors, no FOUC observed. VAL-PWA-015 (Primary Accent Color #00d4ff): accent color is defined as CSS custom property --color-accent: #00d4ff, used consistently across wordmark, focus states, progress indicators, and interactive elements. Contrast ratio is 11.16:1, well above WCAG AA requirements.
